spec_match.rationale: Touches core terms from the chromestatus summary but skips no obvious gaps — secondary spec surfaces are not exercised.

interactive.rationale: Live UI is real (button, eventListener); controls include "Reset scenario view" — well past the no-static-card bar.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Feature-index blurb and page H1/lede share the same framing and surface the same API affordances.

edge_cases.rationale: Only the happy path is shown — no error handling, feature detection, or boundary inputs are surfaced.

references.rationale: see-also section links to https://chromestatus.com/feature/5097414141952000 so the cleanup script can recover this folder.

design_system.rationale: Design-system regressions: button rule overrides background without color (.tab-btn:hover:not(.active)).

runtime_evidence.rationale: Fresh direct browser recheck loaded the route, exercised every detected control, and found no runtime, action, naming, or navigation failure.

summary: Replaced unescaped apostrophes in scenario strings that prevented the entire threat model from loading. Fresh targeted validation passed.
